title: Reasoning, Planning, Decomposition, and Verification · Contract Clinic: Self Checks
summary: Prompt a difficult migration without exposing or demanding hidden reasoning. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt self checks increment in a plan-execute-verify task contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Ask for targeted final checks tied to known failure modes instead of vague self-critique.
Decompose work around independently verifiable outcomes and dependency order.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Self Checks evidence
steps.instruction: Append a contract headed "Evidence: prompt-self-checks-1gqorc" with concrete Goal, Context, Constraints, Output, and Done when sections tailored to this case.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Self Checks into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
Evidence: prompt-self-checks-1gqorc
Goal: [replace with one observable outcome]
Context: [replace with decision-relevant facts]
Constraints: [replace with authority and safety boundaries]
Output: [replace with the artifact and evidence shape]
Done when: [replace with changed-case acceptance criteria]
